initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM event e1
JOIN budget b1 ON e1.event_id = b1.link_to_event
JOIN event e2
JOIN budget b2 ON e2.event_id = b2.link_to_event
WHERE e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' 
  AND b1.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND b2.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND b1.amount > b2.amount;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) 
FROM 
  budget 
  JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id 
WHERE 
  event.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' 
  AND budget.category = 'Advertisement' 
  AND budget.amount > (
    SELECT budget.amount 
    FROM budget 
    JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id 
    WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
      AND budget.category = 'Advertisement' 
    LIMIT 1
  );

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) 
FROM 
    event e1
    JOIN budget b1 ON e1.event_id = b1.link_to_event
    JOIN event e2 ON e2.event_name = 'October Meeting'
    JOIN budget b2 ON e2.event_id = b2.link_to_event
WHERE 
    e1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff'
    AND b1.category = 'Advertisement'
    AND b2.category = 'Advertisement'
    AND b1.amount > b2.amount;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM budget 
JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id 
WHERE event.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' 
  AND budget.category = 'Advertisement' 
  AND budget.amount > (
    SELECT budget.amount 
    FROM budget 
    JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id 
    WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
      AND budget.category = 'Advertisement'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM budget 
JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id 
WHERE event.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' 
  AND budget.category = 'Advertisement' 
  AND budget.amount > (
    SELECT budget.amount 
    FROM budget 
    JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id 
    WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
      AND budget.category = 'Advertisement' 
    LIMIT 1
  );
